title: Marketplace Manager - Delhivery Ventures Solutions - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Delhivery Ventures Solutions - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Marketplace Manager looking for your next big career move? Delhivery Ventures Solutions in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Delhivery Ventures Solutions:
Delhivery Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery Ventures Solutions!
